name: Mirelia-Structured-Data-Marketplace
description: Premium A2A marketplace for AI-ready, structured patent datasets (USPTO). Our datasets feature AI-enriched metadata: 'biz_value_prop', 'attr_tech_stack', and 'importance_p'. Explicitly optimized for autonomous R&D agents, RAG pipelines, and automated competitive intelligence. Specialized in G (Physics/IT) and H (Electricity/Telecom) sections. Supports instant M2M settlements via USDC (Base/Polygon). Universally compatible with both EOA (Native ROSE) and AA/Smart Contract Wallets via automatic WROSE (Wrapped ROSE) routing on Oasis Sapphire.

tools.name: search_single_patents
tools.description: High-precision discovery tool for individual patent data ($0.50 each). Search by primary CPC codes (e.g., G01, G06), cross-domain CPCs, and keywords. Returns 'importance_p' and 'biz_target_ind' for ROI assessment.

tools.name: purchase_single_patent
tools.description: Atomic transaction tool for targeted acquisition. Facilitates 402 Payment Required flow. Supports Native ROSE (EOA) and WROSE (AA/Smart Contract) via pre-built transaction payloads. Returns the FULL structured JSON dataset.

tools.name: search_packages
tools.description: Exploration tool for USPTO bulk patent datasets (10, 100, 1000 items per pack). Query by CPC codes or keywords. Returns price, patent counts, and AI summaries to enable autonomous large-scale evaluation.

tools.name: verify_crypto_payment_and_deliver
tools.description: Final delivery mechanism for bulk packages. Facilitates 402 Payment Required flow for both EOA and AA wallets (USDC/ROSE/WROSE). Validates on-chain hashes and triggers instant delivery via secure CDN.
